title: Visualize Skewed Revenue Data Without Misleading Averages
summary: Revenue distributions are almost always right-skewed. Show the shape, not just the mean.

content.summary: Revenue distributions are almost always right-skewed. Show the shape, not just the mean.

body.text: A single average bar hides whether typical deals are small with rare whales. Use binned bar charts or sorted deal bars. Mark median and selected percentiles if tool supports. Filter test accounts before plotting so skew reflects real business.

body.alt: Charts and graphs for business reporting
body.caption: Charts and graphs for business reporting. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Use binned bar charts or sorted deal bars. Mark median and selected percentiles if tool supports.
Filter test accounts before plotting so skew reflects real business.

items: Pair mean total with median typical deal charts.
Avoid linear scales that squash the long tail unreadably.

body.text: Executives decide differently when they see concentration risk in top accounts.
Saved rules keep skew views consistent export to export.
Datilio charts reveal skew that summary statistics hide.

meta_description: Revenue distributions are almost always right-skewed. Show the shape, not just the mean.
